method: wrangler 4.111.0 read-only (whoami, d1 info, d1 execute SELECT --remote, deployments list, r2 bucket list); changed_db=false on all D1 reads; no resource created, no setting changed, no secret recorded

account.note: account_id and database_id are identifiers already present in the committed wrangler config; OAuth token NOT recorded

deployment.author: linzezhang35@gmail.com
deployment.note: multiple deployments on 2026-07-15; 455afd98 is the latest (100%) version

r2.evidence: wrangler r2 bucket list -> Cloudflare API code 10042 'Please enable R2 through the Cloudflare Dashboard'
r2.action: NOT enabled by agent; enabling R2 is a dashboard/billing/terms action the Owner declined to have done on their behalf

plan_billing.reason: wrangler CLI does not expose plan tier or billing; Owner-dashboard-only
plan_billing.usage_within_free_tier_envelope: informational only: D1 1.05MB storage, 24h rows_read 221565 / rows_written 13426 are within typical D1 free-tier daily limits (5GB / 5M reads / 100k writes); this does NOT confirm the account is on the free plan

drift_findings.finding: live D1 has 14 tables = 8 cloud cn_* (match schema_cloud.sql) + 6 legacy tables (events_inbox, lessons_mirror, manifests_mirror, mirror_meta, review_mirror, selections_mirror) from the retired R6 Mac-mirror/tunnel architecture; schema_cloud.sql defines only the 8 cn_* tables
cloud data is early/small: cn_items 682, cn_sources 33, but cn_selections 1 / cn_lessons 1 / cn_meta 0 -> the cloud daily selection/lesson pipeline has persisted very few rows so far

fact_status_updates.FACT-011: VERIFIED (D1 schema 14 tables, size 1.05MB, per-table counts, 24h metrics)
fact_status_updates.FACT-013: UNVERIFIED_PRIVATE (plan/billing CLI-inaccessible; usage within free-tier envelope, not a plan confirmation)
fact_status_updates.FACT-014: PARTIAL: current live adp-cloud version 455afd98; public-surface parity 0.9973 (T004); strict per-hostname build equality not separately proven
